title: psychotria leiocarpa var. genuina
intro: Psychotria leiocarpa var. genuina is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is also known as a type of wild coffee or wild coffee tree. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestive health, as well as having antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to extract its medicinal compounds, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
